items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Scope downgrade on token refresh'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from this scenario simulation. The expected result mentions a confirmation of behavior or a clear failure report, but without any execution traces or snapshots, it is impossible to assess whether the requirement is met.
